explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in D tier with an overall score of 1 from a base nutrition score of 15. Context dragged it down by 14 points.

topPros.title: simple traditional fat
topPros.explanation: This gives butter a cleaner identity than heavily processed fat substitutes.

topCons.title: saturated fat is a major drawback
topCons.explanation: This is the main reason butter cannot be an elite oils-and-fats food.

closing.summary: Butter does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
